message:
fix: Runtime module exports and scope-aware temp variables

Long-term fixes for generated code compilation:

1. **Runtime module exports**: Re-export hashmap_helper, allocator_helper,
   assertEqualGeneric, compile_builtin, Scheduler, and scheduler from
   runtime module so generated code can use runtime.* instead of
   standalone imports

2. **Codegen import fixes**: Changed generated code to use
   runtime.hashmap_helper, runtime.allocator_helper, and unittest.*
   instead of direct imports that aren't available at compile time

3. **Scope-aware putTempVar**: Fixed type inference for comprehension
   loop variables - putTempVar now uses scoped_var_types when in a scope
   so temp vars properly shadow outer scope variables (fixes dict
   comprehension key type inference)

4. **Scheduler optional unwrap**: Fixed scheduler calls to use .? unwrap
   since scheduler is an optional type

5. **batch_build.zig**: Added missing utils.allocator_helper import for
   runtime module

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
